name: risutoki
description: RisuAI .charx file editor with integrated terminal and MomoTalk UI

scripts.dev:electron: npm run build:electron && wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron .
scripts.prestart: npm run build:electron && npm run build:renderer
scripts.lint: npx eslint main.ts test/test-rpack.ts test/test-charx.ts test/test-reference-store.ts test/test-refs-popout-data.ts test/test-popout-payload-store.ts test/test-terminal-shell.ts src/main.ts src/popout.ts src/App.vue src/App.test.ts vite.config.ts vitest.setup.ts src/components/MenuBar.vue src/components/StatusBar.vue --max-warnings=0
scripts.test:references: node test/test-reference-store.js && node test/test-refs-popout-data.js && node test/test-popout-payload-store.js && node test/test-terminal-shell.js && node test/test-main-state-store.js
scripts.test:evals: vitest run src/lib/mcp-response-envelope.test.ts src/lib/mcp-tool-taxonomy.test.ts src/lib/section-parser.test.ts src/lib/mcp-api-server.test.ts --reporter=verbose -t "agent eval"
scripts.test:mcp: npm run build:node-libs && npm run build:mcp && node test/test-mcp-search-all.js
scripts.test: npm run build:node-libs && npm run test-rpack && npm run test-charx && npm run test:references && npm run test:unit && npm run test:mcp
scripts.build:electron: npm run build:node-libs && npm run build:mcp && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && npm run build:preload
scripts.build: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build:electron && npm run build:renderer
scripts.dist: npm run build:electron && npm run build:renderer && electron-builder
scripts.dist:portable: npm run build:electron && npm run build:renderer && electron-builder --win portable
scripts.dist:installer: npm run build:electron && npm run build:renderer && electron-builder --win nsis
scripts.dist:all: npm run build:electron && npm run build:renderer && electron-builder --win nsis portable

author: toki
